---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    css: cv_style_webpage_2column.css
    theme: default
    format-links: false
    grid:
      body-width: 920px
#bibliography: Bibliography/My Library.bib
---

```{r}
#| label: required-packages
#| echo: false
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(googlesheets4)
library(quarto)
library(renderthis)
```

```{r}
#| label: read-cv-data
#| echo: false
#| include: false
cv_data <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/12-v_2G9hekg9jv-Om4kFGLmT733Bnb6p_NSW0jl6nYY/edit?gid=1958414084#gid=1958414084"

personal_info <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Personal_Info") 
education <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Education") 
employment <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Employment") 
projects <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Projects") 
skills <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Skills") 
certifications <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Certifications") 
professional_service <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Professional_Service")
professional_memberships <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "Professional_Memberships")
references <- read_sheet(cv_data, sheet = "References")
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-personal-info
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Extract personal information
name <- paste0(personal_info$First_Name_Short, " ", personal_info$Last_Name, ", ", personal_info$Degree)
professional_title <- personal_info$Professional_Title
email <- personal_info$Email
phone <- personal_info$Cell_Phone
website <- personal_info$Website
linkedin <- personal_info$LinkedIn
github <- personal_info$Github
professional_statement <- personal_info$Professional_Statement

cat("::: {.personal_info}\n\n")
cat("::: {.text-center}\n\n")
cat("# ", name, "\n\n")
cat("<div class=\"professional-title\">**", professional_title, "**</div>\n\n", sep = "")
if (!is.na(professional_statement)) {
  cat("::: {.professional-statement}\n", professional_statement, "\n:::\n\n", sep = "")
}
cat(":::\n\n")
cat(":::\n\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-contact
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Full-width Contact band between header and the two-column layout
cat("::: {.contact_info}\n\n")
cat("## Contact\n\n")

# Website is stored as a bare domain in the sheet; add a scheme so the link works.
website_url <- if (grepl("^https?://", website)) website else paste0("https://", website)

cat("::: {.contact-items}\n")
cat("[", email, "]{.contact-item} ",
    "[|]{.contact-sep} ",
    "[[", website, "](", website_url, ")]{.contact-item} ",
    "[|]{.contact-sep} ",
    "[[{{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn](", linkedin, ")]{.contact-item} ",
    "[|]{.contact-sep} ",
    "[[{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub](", github, ")]{.contact-item} ",
    # Download PDF is web-only (hidden in the printed PDF via .screen-only);
    # hide its leading separator too so no dangling "|" remains in the PDF.
    "[|]{.contact-sep .screen-only} ",
    "[[{{< fa solid file-pdf >}} Download PDF](CV_Sippel.pdf)]{.contact-item .screen-only}\n",
    sep = "")
cat(":::\n\n")
cat(":::\n\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-layout
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Start 2-column container
cat(":::: {.columns style=\"column-gap: 1%;\"}\n\n")

# Left column - Employment and Professional Service (70%)
cat("::: {.column width=\"70%\"}\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-employment
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

cat("::: {.employment}\n\n")
cat("## Work History\n\n")

walk(1:7, \(i) {
  emp <- employment |> slice(i)

  # Spacer between employers (reduced white space)
  if (i > 1) {
    cat("::: {.emp-sep}\n:::\n\n")
  }

  cat("**", emp$Employer, "**, ", emp$Position_Title, ": ",
      emp$Month_Start, " ", emp$Year_Start, " - ",
      ifelse(is.na(emp$Month_End), "Present", paste(emp$Month_End, emp$Year_End)),
      "\n\n", sep = "")
  
  cat("::: {style=\"margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 0;\"}\n")
  cat(":::: {.callout-note appearance=\"minimal\" style=\"padding-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; border-left-color: #723d42ff; border: 0.0px solid #723d42ff\"}\n")
  cat("::: {style=\"margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 0\"}\n")

  # Add the position description
  if (!is.na(emp$Position_Description)) {
    cat("::: {style=\"font-size: 72%;\"}\n")
    cat("**Position:** ", emp$Position_Description, "\n", sep = "")
    cat(":::\n\n")
  }

  # Add the Accomplishments column (ignore Accomplishments_ columns)
  if (!is.na(emp$Accomplishments)) {
    cat("::: {style=\"font-size: 72%;\"}\n")
    cat("**Accomplishments:** ", emp$Accomplishments, "\n", sep = "")
    cat(":::\n\n")
  }
  
  cat(":::\n")
  cat("::::\n:::\n\n")
})

cat(":::\n\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-professional-service
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Professional Service
cat("::: {.professional_service}\n\n")
cat("## Professional Service\n\n")

walk(1:nrow(professional_service), \(i) {
  ps <- professional_service |> slice(i)

  # Year_End is a list-column (mixed numbers and text), so pull out the scalar
  year_end <- ps$Year_End
  if (is.list(year_end)) year_end <- year_end[[1]]

  year_range <- if(length(year_end) == 0 || is.na(year_end)) {
    as.character(ps$Year_Start)
  } else {
    paste0(ps$Year_Start, " - ", year_end)
  }

  cat("**", ps$Professional_Service, "**, ", ps$Institution, ": ", year_range, "\n\n", sep = "")
})

cat(":::\n\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-close-left-column
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

cat(":::\n\n")  # Close left column
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-right-column
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Right column - Skills, Project Experience, Education (30%)
cat("::: {.column width=\"30%\"}\n\n")

# Skills
cat("::: {.skills}\n\n")
cat("## Technical Skills\n\n")
walk(1:nrow(skills), \(i) {
  skill <- skills |> slice(i)
  if (!is.na(skill$Description)) {
    cat("- **", skill$Skill, "**: ", skill$Description, "\n", sep = "")
  } else {
    cat("- **", skill$Skill, "**\n", sep = "")
  }
})
cat(":::\n\n")

# Project Experience
cat("::: {.project_experience}\n\n")
cat("::: {.pubs-header}\n\n")
cat("## Project Experience\n\n")
cat("[Details →](CV/Projects.html){.all-pubs-link}\n\n")
cat(":::\n\n")

# Consolidate project types that appear in multiple locations, e.g.
# "Fish passage (Oregon)" + "Fish passage (Washington)" ->
# "Fish passage (Oregon, Washington)". The type name is bolded; the
# combined "(locations)" list stays in normal weight. Type and location
# order follow first appearance in the Projects sheet.
project_types <- projects$Project_Type |>
  na.omit() |>
  unique()

project_types_fmt <- tibble(raw = project_types) |>
  mutate(
    name     = str_trim(str_replace(raw, "\\s*\\(.*\\)\\s*$", "")),
    location = str_match(raw, "\\((.*)\\)\\s*$")[, 2]
  ) |>
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = unique(name))) |>
  group_by(name) |>
  summarise(
    locations = paste(unique(location[!is.na(location)]), collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(name) |>
  mutate(
    name  = as.character(name),
    entry = if_else(locations == "",
                    paste0("**", name, "**"),
                    paste0("**", name, "** (", locations, ")"))
  ) |>
  pull(entry)

cat(paste(project_types_fmt, collapse = "; "), "\n\n")

cat(":::\n\n")

# Education
cat("::: {.education}\n\n")
cat("## Education\n\n")
walk(1:nrow(education), \(i) {
  edu <- education |> slice(i)
  cat("**", edu$Degree, "** - ", edu$Degree_specialization, ", ", edu$Institution, ", ", edu$Location, "\n\n", sep = "")
})
cat(":::\n\n")

# Professional Memberships
cat("::: {.professional_memberships}\n\n")
cat("## Professional Memberships\n\n")
walk(1:nrow(professional_memberships), \(i) {
  pm <- professional_memberships |> slice(i)

  year_end <- pm$Year_end
  if (is.list(year_end)) year_end <- year_end[[1]]
  year_range <- if (length(year_end) == 0 || is.na(year_end)) {
    as.character(pm$Year_Start)
  } else {
    paste0(pm$Year_Start, " - ", year_end)
  }

  cat("**", pm$Organization, "**: ", year_range, "\n\n", sep = "")
})
cat(":::\n\n")

cat(":::\n\n")   # Close right column
cat("::::\n\n")  # Close columns container
```

```{r}
#| label: cv-publications
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Selected publications: the subset flagged in Zotero (tag "cv-selected", carried
# into the bib as `keywords = {selected}` by sync_zotero.R), newest first, with
# "Sippel" bolded. The full list lives on Publications.html (Publications.qmd).
# Shared parsing/formatting is in publications.R. Run `Rscript sync_zotero.R`
# to refresh the bib before rendering.
source("publications.R")
bib_path <- "Bibliography/cv_publications.bib"

pubs <- parse_publications(bib_path)
selected <- Filter(function(r) isTRUE(r$selected), pubs)
peer_reviewed <- Filter(function(r) !is_report(r), selected)
reports       <- Filter(is_report, selected)

cat("::: {.publications}\n\n")
cat("::: {.pubs-header}\n\n")
cat("## Selected Publications\n\n")
cat("[See all publications →](CV/Publications.html){.all-pubs-link}\n\n")
cat(":::\n\n")
if (length(peer_reviewed)) {
  cat("### Peer-reviewed publications\n\n")
  for (r in peer_reviewed) cat(format_entry(r), "\n\n")
}
if (length(reports)) {
  cat("### Reports\n\n")
  for (r in reports) cat(format_entry(r), "\n\n")
}
cat(":::\n\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: render-siblings
#| echo: false
#| include: false

# Keep the supplement pages in sync with the CV: whenever CV.qmd is rendered on
# its own (e.g. from the IDE), also re-render Publications.html and Projects.html.
# render.sh sets CV_SKIP_SIBLINGS=1 for the full-project `quarto render`, which
# already builds all three pages, so this only fires for single-file renders and
# never double-renders. The guard also prevents any nested re-entry.
if (Sys.getenv("CV_SKIP_SIBLINGS") != "1") {
  Sys.setenv(CV_SKIP_SIBLINGS = "1")
  quarto::quarto_render("Publications.qmd")
  quarto::quarto_render("Projects.qmd")
}
```
